rationale: The work is isolated to metadata, schemas, deterministic indexes, tests, and manifests in RTS. Adjacent repositories are read-only evidence sources and rollback is a single PR revert. Reconstructable completion evidence: PR #228; merge commit 9bafaa74ff56e5765060408c133ac106337a4574.
existing_assumptions: Private repository names and high-level roles are safe approved metadata
No adjacent repository mutation is required
JSON and Python standard library are sufficient
completion_conditions: Immutable snapshot and three deterministic indexes verified
Privacy, license, ownership, pointer and hash rules tested
Parent/child FREEZER records preserve scope boundaries
external_interfaces: GitHub repository metadata and file refs as read-only evidence
No runtime API or credential connection
approval_changes: Only RTS-FRZ-000004 receives APPROVED authority for this PR

data_migration.notes: New append-only v001 snapshot only; no existing record is rewritten.

hidden_dependencies: FREEZER tests previously assumed a small fixed seed set and may need non-brittle updates
Manifest hashes must be regenerated after any tracked file change
Private repository locators must stay logical and metadata-only
rollback_boundary: Revert the Cross-Repo Asset Manifest PR; no adjacent repository or external state is mutated.
